design_philosophy: Create a warm, grounding, and emotionally resonant dashboard. Emphasize soft edges, generous breathing room (negative space), and clear typography. Avoid the generic 'SaaS dashboard' aesthetic. The design should feel tactile, like a quiet, intentional space for growth.

surface_styles.card_organic: bg-white dark:bg-[#1C2217] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(74,93,58,0.06)] dark:shadow-none border border-[#1C2316]/5 dark:border-white/5
surface_styles.glass: bg-white/70 dark:bg-[#12160F]/60 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/40 dark:border-white/10 shadow-sm

welcome_section.layout: Flex column, generous top padding (pt-12). Left-aligned.
welcome_section.text: Greeting label in text_muted, Name in Fraunces H1. Adds emotional intimacy immediately.

lesson_card.background: Use the primary color bg-[#4A5D3A]. Text inside must be pure white (#FFFFFF) for contrast.
lesson_card.image_overlay: Apply abstract nature image with mix-blend-overlay and 20% opacity. Never use a heavy black blanket.
lesson_card.progress_bar: Custom segmented tracker. 5 rounded pills side-by-side. Active=bg-white, inactive=bg-white/20.
lesson_card.content: Title in Fraunces H2, Date in small label, Description in body text.

quick_actions.layout: Asymmetrical row or scattered bento items rather than a boring equal grid.
quick_actions.buttons: Circular or Squircle shape, prominent icons. Duotone icons inside rounded-full containers with 'card_flat' surface style.

items: Streak: col-span-1 row-span-2 (Tall card, large number in Fraunces H1)

recent_chat.style: glass card, floating over the background, previewing 1-2 messages. Avatar + Manrope body.

schedule.layout: Vertical list with timeline-style connector. Uses generous gap-6 spacing.

motion.hover: Subtle scale (scale-95 on press), hover:-translate-y-1 for cards.
motion.celebration: When 5 steps done, trigger an organic, warm sunburst or floating leaves animation rather than generic confetti.

image_urls.description: Abstract olive green flowing shapes for the hero 'This Week's Lesson' card. Mix blend to act as texture.
Small group of people talking, for the chat or courses section.

technical_instructions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (Duotone weight) for all UI icons to match the warm organic feel.
technical_instructions.testing: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='lesson-card-start').
technical_instructions.mobile_first: Design specifically for mobile. Desktop should show this in a centered max-w-md view or scaled up gracefully. Keep the bottom nav padding pb-[100px].
technical_instructions.typography_setup: Add Fraunces and Manrope imports to index.css and define them in tailwind.config.js.
